name: FlyDSL FMHA (ROCm 7.13)
postCreateCommand: pip install flydsl einops && if ! python -c 'import aiter' 2>/dev/null; then cd /workspaces/aiter && AITER_USE_SYSTEM_TRITON=1 python3 setup.py develop; fi && python -c "import flydsl, aiter, torch; print('flydsl OK, aiter OK, torch', torch.__version__)"
